title: Heltec V3: validate Renode simulation
description: Boot firmware in Renode using heltec_wifi_lora32_v3.resc. Verify CPU starts, UART works, SX1262 connects to lichen-sim, basic TX works. Document ESP32-S3 Renode limitations.
notes: Commit: 9f9277b1d. Validated basic Renode boot/CPU/UART/SX1262/lichen-sim connection + TX for heltec_wifi_lora32_v3 using puck config. Expanded README with validation commands, peripherals table update, and detailed ESP32-S3 Renode limitations (single-core, stubbed GPIO/I2C, no display). Addresses previous skeletal model FAILs from m5m1 audit.
close_reason: Renode simulation validated for CPU/UART/SX1262/lichen-sim/TX on heltec_wifi_lora32_v3. README updated with commands, status, and ESP32-S3 limitations. Addresses prior audit FAILs.
